narrative:
Springdale D (precinct in Hamilton County) has 790 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
